README: Single source of truth for the card-grid attribute.
The sizes string is one clause per (density tier x layout breakpoint), and the
browser uses the first matching clause, so density tiers are ordered densest
first and each list ends with a null-condition default.
layout: [media condition, slot-width formula]. Formulas are the CSS grid slot
widths (body padding 1em x2, card padding 0.8em x2, gap 15px); each max-width
is one below the corresponding grid min-width threshold in styles.css.
density: [media condition, multiplier]. Multipliers implement the fidelity
budget - an effective-DPR cap of ~1.5 for grid thumbnails, computed as
1.5 / assumed tier DPR (3x, 2x). Grid cells don't earn full retina fidelity;
the modal is the 1:1 surface. Multipliers are strings so Python and JS emit
byte-identical text. See docs/issues/homepage-lcp.md for the design.
Consumers: api/noscript_helpers.py loads this file; api/static/app.js embeds a
mirrored copy (app.test.js asserts it matches this file, and the shared
card-HTML parity fixture keeps both renderers' output identical);
api/tests/test_noscript_parity.py checks the layout table against styles.css.
